subtitleHint: Async auto-battler — daily battles, meta progression, fair monetization (no pay-to-win).

shortDescription.en: Build a squad, run daily battles, climb the pass — strategic auto-combat you can finish in minutes.
shortDescription.tr: Kadronu kur, günlük savaşları oyna, pass'te ilerle — dakikalar içinde bitebilen stratejik auto-combat.
